allow: Bash(node -e "try { import\('node:sqlite'\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('node:sqlite available'\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('node:sqlite NOT available:', e.code||e.message\)\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\('node:sqlite import failed:', e.message\) }")

PowerShell($env:CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY="39936274ca76682086b1ab05a63e4545ddb49"; $env:CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL="simon@localblitz.io"; Set-Location C:\\CodeProjects\\DomainEdge; Write-Output "--- generate ephemeral creds ---"; $newUser = "claude-test-$\(Get-Random -Maximum 99999\)"; $newPass = -join \(\(48..57\) + \(65..90\) + \(97..122\) | Get-Random -Count 32 | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }\); Write-Output "USER=$newUser"; Write-Output "PASS=$newPass"; Write-Output "--- writing ADMIN_USERNAME ---"; $newUser | npx wrangler secret put ADMIN_USERNAME --name edge-seo-admin 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; Write-Output "--- writing ADMIN_PASSWORD ---"; $newPass | npx wrangler secret put ADMIN_PASSWORD --name edge-seo-admin 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("CLAUDE_ADMIN_USER", $newUser, "User"\); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("CLAUDE_ADMIN_PASS", $newPass, "User"\))

Bash(curl -sS -u __TRACKED_VAR__:__TRACKED_VAR__ -X POST __TRACKED_VAR__/clients/lantern-crest/attest -H 'Origin: https://edge-seo-admin.localblitzio.workers.dev' -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -H 'User-Agent: claude-acceptance-test/1.0' --data-urlencode attested_by_email=acceptance-test@localblitz.io --data-urlencode attested_ip=10.0.0.42 --data-urlencode scope=specified_paths --data-urlencode scope_paths=/blog,/landing --data-urlencode user_agent=manual-test-via-claude -D .scratch/attest.headers -o /dev/null -w 'HTTP %{http_code}\\n')

PowerShell($env:CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY="39936274ca76682086b1ab05a63e4545ddb49"; $env:CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL="simon@localblitz.io"; Set-Location C:\\CodeProjects\\DomainEdge; npx wrangler d1 execute CONFIG_DB --env staging --remote --json --command "SELECT id, client_id, attested_by_email, attested_ip, scope, scope_paths_json, user_agent FROM attestations" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern '"id"|"client_id"|"attested_by_email"|"attested_ip"|"scope"|"scope_paths_json"|"user_agent"' | Select-Object -First 15)

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.scratch/new-form.html','utf8'\); const m=s.match\(/<script>[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/\); console.log\('script:', m ? m[0].length : 0, 'bytes'\); console.log\('contains syncFromJson:', /syncFromJson/.test\(s\)\); console.log\('contains syncToJson:', /syncToJson/.test\(s\)\); const taMatch = s.match\(/<textarea id=\\"config_json\\"/\); console.log\('textarea present:', !!taMatch\);")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\CodeProjects\\DomainEdge; $cred = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n`n" | git credential fill 2>&1; if \($cred -match 'password=\(.+\)'\) { $token = $Matches[1]; Write-Output "got token starting with: $\($token.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(8,$token.Length\)\)\)..."; Write-Output "len: $\($token.Length\)"; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("GH_TOKEN", $token, "Process"\); $env:GH_TOKEN = $token; Write-Output "--- test API auth ---"; \(curl.exe -sS -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" "https://api.github.com/user" | ConvertFrom-Json\).login } else { Write-Output "NO PASSWORD IN CREDENTIAL"; Write-Output $cred })

Bash(node -e "let s=''; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(s\); for \(const r of j.workflow_runs\) { console.log\('#'+r.run_number, '|', r.status, '|', r.conclusion || '\(running\)', '|', r.head_branch, '|', r.head_commit.message.split\('\\n'\)[0].slice\(0,60\)\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.scratch/zone-form.html','utf8'\); const m=s.match\(/<textarea id=\\"config_json\\"[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/textarea>/\); const raw=m[1].replace\(/&/g,'&'\).replace\(/</g,'<'\).replace\(/>/g,'>'\).replace\(/"/g,'\\"'\).replace\(/'/g,\\"'\\"\); const cfg=JSON.parse\(raw\); console.log\('  template proxy_domain:', cfg.proxy_domain\);")
